tools.name: list_collections
tools.description: List all collections you have access to

tools.name: create_collection
tools.description: Create a new collection in Needle for storing documents

tools.name: get_collection_details
tools.description: Get detailed information about a specific collection

collection_id.description: ID of the collection to get details for

tools.name: get_collection_stats
tools.description: Get statistics for a specific collection

collection_id.description: ID of the collection to get stats for

tools.name: list_collection_files
tools.description: List all files in a specific collection

collection_id.description: ID of the collection to list files from

tools.name: add_file
tools.description: Add a file to an existing collection by URL

collection_id.description: ID of the collection to add the file to

url.description: URL where the file can be downloaded from

tools.name: search
tools.description: Search for relevant content within a collection

collection_id.description: ID of the collection to search in
